mnemonics: ARRAY-O: An Array is a Row of Your Objects
keyPoints: An array of objects is created like any other array, but the data type is a user-defined class.
Each element in the array must be initialized, often using a loop and the class constructor.
Member functions of individual objects in the array are accessed using the array index and the dot operator (e.g., `employeeList[2].calculateSalary()`).
commonMistakes: Forgetting to initialize each object in the array, leading to undefined behavior when member functions are called.
Accessing an index beyond the array bounds, which is a common error with all arrays but especially critical with objects.
